astrology.element.0.name: Fire
astrology.element.1.name: Earth
astrology.element.2.name: Air
astrology.element.3.name: Water
astrology.modality.0.name: Cardinal
astrology.modality.0.role: Begins the season — the spark that starts
astrology.modality.1.name: Fixed
astrology.modality.1.role: Holds the season — the strength that endures
astrology.modality.2.name: Mutable
astrology.modality.2.role: Ends the season — the wisdom that releases
astrology.sign.0.brief: The spark that begins — raw courage to exist
astrology.sign.0.name: Aries
astrology.sign.1.brief: The earth that endures — patient cultivation of beauty
astrology.sign.1.name: Taurus
astrology.sign.10.brief: The wave that carries — freedom in service of all
astrology.sign.10.name: Aquarius
astrology.sign.11.brief: The ocean that dissolves — unity beyond separation
astrology.sign.11.name: Pisces
astrology.sign.2.brief: The breath between — connecting through language
astrology.sign.2.name: Gemini
astrology.sign.3.brief: The shell that protects — feeling as a form of knowing
astrology.sign.3.name: Cancer
astrology.sign.4.brief: The fire that sustains — the courage to shine
astrology.sign.4.name: Leo
astrology.sign.5.brief: The hand that mends — wholeness through discernment
astrology.sign.5.name: Virgo
astrology.sign.6.brief: The scales that balance — beauty as equilibrium
astrology.sign.6.name: Libra
astrology.sign.7.brief: The depth that transforms — death as doorway
astrology.sign.7.name: Scorpio
astrology.sign.8.brief: The arrow that seeks — meaning beyond the horizon
astrology.sign.8.name: Sagittarius
astrology.sign.9.brief: The mountain that stands — authority earned through time
astrology.sign.9.name: Capricorn
astrology.tpl.detail: %1$s Sun: %2$s. %3$s. Keywords: %4$s. Shadow: %5$s. Element: %6$s (%7$s). Modality: %8$s (%9$s). Moon in %10$s: emotional nature is %11$s.
astronomy.phase.0.brief: The dark seed — invisible, full of potential, everything begins here
astronomy.phase.0.guidance: Set intentions, start projects, rest and reflect in the darkness
astronomy.phase.0.name: New Moon
astronomy.phase.0.theme: Beginnings, seed planting, intention setting, the dark of renewal
astronomy.phase.1.brief: The first sliver — intention made visible, the young light gathering strength
astronomy.phase.1.guidance: Take the first step, gather resources, push through initial resistance
astronomy.phase.1.name: Waxing Crescent
astronomy.phase.1.theme: Emerging intention, first commitment, the courage to begin
astronomy.phase.2.brief: The half-lit choice — light and dark in equal measure, the crossroads
astronomy.phase.2.guidance: Make decisions, overcome obstacles, commit to the direction chosen
astronomy.phase.2.name: First Quarter
astronomy.phase.2.theme: Challenge, decision, the crisis of action
astronomy.phase.3.brief: Almost full — the final preparation, polishing before the peak
astronomy.phase.3.guidance: Refine the plan, adjust based on feedback, trust the process
astronomy.phase.3.name: Waxing Gibbous
astronomy.phase.4.brief: The full light — everything illuminated, nothing hidden, the peak
astronomy.phase.4.guidance: Celebrate completion, see clearly, harvest what was planted at the new moon
astronomy.phase.4.name: Full Moon
astronomy.phase.5.brief: The generous decline — the light begins to give itself away
astronomy.phase.5.guidance: Share what you've learned, give back, express gratitude for the harvest
astronomy.phase.5.name: Waning Gibbous
astronomy.phase.6.brief: The half-lit release — light and dark again equal, but now the light is leaving
astronomy.phase.6.guidance: Let go of what no longer serves, forgive, clear space for the new
astronomy.phase.6.name: Last Quarter
astronomy.phase.6.theme: Release, forgiveness, clearing, the crisis of letting go
astronomy.phase.7.brief: The last whisper — the thinnest light before the dark, the wisdom of surrender
astronomy.phase.7.guidance: Rest deeply, surrender control, prepare for the coming darkness
astronomy.phase.7.name: Waning Crescent
astronomy.phase.7.theme: Surrender, rest, preparation for the void, the balsamic phase
astronomy.planet.0.archetype: The Trickster-Messenger — quicksilver mind, the psychopomp who bridges realms
astronomy.planet.0.brief: The swift messenger — closest to the Sun, never far from the source of light
astronomy.planet.0.domain: Communication, intellect, commerce, the messenger between worlds
astronomy.planet.0.name: Mercury
astronomy.planet.1.archetype: The Beloved — the mirror of desire, beauty as a force that civilizes
astronomy.planet.1.brief: The morning and evening star — the brightest planet, whose light is borrowed
astronomy.planet.1.domain: Love, beauty, harmony, values, artistic creation
astronomy.planet.1.name: Venus
astronomy.planet.2.archetype: The Mother — the living world that sustains all observation of the cosmos
astronomy.planet.2.brief: The pale blue dot — the only planet we know that looks back at the sky
astronomy.planet.2.domain: Home, embodiment, the body, the ground we stand on
astronomy.planet.2.name: Earth
astronomy.planet.3.archetype: The Warrior — the red force that fights for what matters
astronomy.planet.3.brief: The red planet — iron-rusted, blood-colored, named for the god of war
astronomy.planet.3.domain: Action, drive, conflict, courage, the will to assert
astronomy.planet.3.name: Mars
astronomy.planet.4.archetype: The King — the largest body in the solar system after the Sun, protector and judge
astronomy.planet.4.brief: The great benefic — more massive than all other planets combined
astronomy.planet.4.domain: Expansion, wisdom, generosity, law, the great benefic
astronomy.planet.4.name: Jupiter
astronomy.planet.5.archetype: The Elder — the ringed boundary, the lesson that cannot be avoided
astronomy.planet.5.brief: The ringed teacher — beautiful and severe, the lord of time and consequence
astronomy.planet.5.domain: Structure, limitation, time, discipline, the great teacher
astronomy.planet.5.name: Saturn
astronomy.planet.6.archetype: The Awakener — the lightning bolt of change, the force that disrupts to liberate
astronomy.planet.6.brief: The tilted rebel — rolling on its side, the planet that breaks every rule
astronomy.planet.6.domain: Revolution, originality, sudden insight, the unexpected
astronomy.planet.6.name: Uranus
astronomy.planet.7.archetype: The Mystic — the dissolving ocean where boundaries cease to exist
astronomy.planet.7.brief: The blue dreamer — farthest major planet, where the solar system fades into mystery
astronomy.planet.7.domain: Imagination, transcendence, illusion, the oceanic unconscious
astronomy.planet.7.name: Neptune
astronomy.tpl.detail_retro: RETROGRADE: apparent backward motion — the planet's themes turn inward for review.
astronomy.tpl.detail_retrograde: RETROGRADE: apparent backward motion — the planet's themes turn inward for review.
buddhist.kalpa.0.description: Worlds arise from emptiness — matter condenses, beings take form
buddhist.kalpa.0.meaning: The cosmic breath inward — creation as inevitable arising
buddhist.kalpa.0.name: Formation
buddhist.kalpa.1.description: Beings live, die, and are reborn — the wheel turns
buddhist.kalpa.1.meaning: The present era — sentient experience in all its suffering and beauty
buddhist.kalpa.1.name: Existence
buddhist.kalpa.2.description: Worlds dissolve through fire, water, or wind
buddhist.kalpa.2.meaning: The cosmic breath outward — all conditioned things are impermanent
buddhist.kalpa.2.name: Destruction
buddhist.kalpa.3.description: Vast darkness between worlds — nothing remains
buddhist.kalpa.3.meaning: The great rest — potential without form, like dreamless sleep
buddhist.kalpa.3.name: Emptiness
buddhist.month.11.meaning: Month of the Sangha — community of awakening
buddhist.month.11.observance: Magha Puja — Sangha Day, 1250 monks gathered
buddhist.month.12.meaning: Month of completion — cycle prepares to renew
buddhist.month.2.meaning: The most sacred month — triple anniversary
buddhist.month.4.meaning: Month of the first teaching — the Wheel turns
buddhist.month.5.meaning: Month of withdrawal — monastics enter retreat
buddhist.month.8.meaning: Month of generosity — dana and gratitude
buddhist.month.9.meaning: Month of the path — quiet walking
buddhist.uposatha.0.meaning: An ordinary day in the cycle
buddhist.uposatha.0.name: No Observance
buddhist.uposatha.1.meaning: Darkness as potential — the seed moment before renewal
buddhist.uposatha.1.name: New Moon Observance
buddhist.uposatha.1.practice: Monastics recite Patimokkha; laity observe 8 precepts
buddhist.uposatha.2.meaning: Illumination — the Buddha's birth, enlightenment, and parinibbana all on full moons
buddhist.uposatha.2.name: Full Moon Observance
buddhist.uposatha.2.practice: Most important — full Patimokkha recital, intensive practice
buddhist.uposatha.3.meaning: Growing light — effort and aspiration building
buddhist.uposatha.3.name: Waxing Half-Moon
buddhist.uposatha.4.meaning: Releasing — wisdom of impermanence, letting go
buddhist.uposatha.4.name: Waning Half-Moon
chinese.animal.0.brief: First in the cycle — the clever mind that finds opportunity in chaos
chinese.animal.0.name: Rat
chinese.animal.1.brief: The strength that plows through — patient endurance conquers all
chinese.animal.1.name: Ox
chinese.animal.10.brief: The faithfulness that anchors — loyalty as the highest virtue
chinese.animal.10.name: Dog
chinese.animal.11.brief: The abundance that overflows — generosity without calculation
chinese.animal.11.name: Pig
chinese.animal.2.brief: The roar that awakens — fearless action in service of justice
chinese.animal.2.name: Tiger
chinese.animal.3.brief: The grace that disarms — softness as a form of power
chinese.animal.3.name: Rabbit
chinese.animal.4.brief: The only mythical animal — the dream of transcendence made manifest
chinese.animal.4.name: Dragon
chinese.animal.5.brief: The coil that strikes true — deep wisdom beneath a still surface
chinese.animal.5.name: Snake
chinese.animal.6.brief: The gallop that liberates — freedom as a way of being
chinese.animal.6.name: Horse
chinese.animal.7.brief: The heart that creates — beauty born from sensitivity
chinese.animal.7.name: Goat
chinese.animal.8.brief: The mind that plays — genius disguised as mischief
chinese.animal.8.name: Monkey
chinese.animal.9.brief: The voice that calls truth — precision in all things
chinese.animal.9.name: Rooster
chinese.element.0.expression: Through creativity, vision, and upward movement
chinese.element.0.name: Wood
chinese.element.1.name: Fire
chinese.element.2.expression: Through grounding, nurture, and practical care
chinese.element.2.name: Earth
chinese.element.3.expression: Through refinement, letting go, and sharp focus
chinese.element.3.name: Metal
chinese.element.4.expression: Through flow, stillness, and the power of yielding
chinese.element.4.name: Water
chinese.tpl.detail: %1$s %2$s: %3$s. Strengths: %4$s. Challenges: %5$s. Best with: %6$s. Element: %7$s (%8$s) — %9$s. Year %10$d of 60.
gregorian.day.0.brief: The Moon's day — intuition, emotion, the tides within
gregorian.day.0.name: Monday
gregorian.day.1.brief: Mars' day — courage, action, the warrior's resolve
gregorian.day.1.name: Tuesday
gregorian.day.1.origin: Old English Tiwesdaeg (Tyr's day, Norse Mars)
gregorian.day.2.brief: Mercury's day — communication, craft, the trickster's wit
gregorian.day.2.name: Wednesday
gregorian.day.2.origin: Old English Wodnesdaeg (Woden's day, Norse Mercury)
gregorian.day.3.brief: Jupiter's day — expansion, abundance, the thunder god's generosity
gregorian.day.3.name: Thursday
gregorian.day.3.origin: Old English Thunresdaeg (Thor's day, Norse Jupiter)
gregorian.day.4.brief: Venus' day — love, beauty, the goddess of desire
gregorian.day.4.name: Friday
gregorian.day.4.origin: Old English Frigedaeg (Freya's day, Norse Venus)
gregorian.day.5.brief: Saturn's day — discipline, structure, the taskmaster's lesson
gregorian.day.5.name: Saturday
gregorian.day.6.brief: The Sun's day — vitality, sovereignty, the center of all orbits
gregorian.day.6.name: Sunday
gregorian.month.1.brief: The month of doorways — one face looks back, one looks forward
gregorian.month.1.name: January
gregorian.month.1.origin: Janus — two-faced god of beginnings, gates, and transitions
gregorian.month.10.brief: The eighth month — the world turns inward as the light contracts
gregorian.month.10.name: October
gregorian.month.10.origin: Octo (eight) — the eighth month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.month.11.brief: The ninth month — the dead are honored as the year grows old
gregorian.month.11.name: November
gregorian.month.11.origin: Novem (nine) — the ninth month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.month.11.quality: Late autumn, remembrance, preparation for dark
gregorian.month.12.brief: The tenth month — in the deepest dark, the ancient Romans feasted and the sun was reborn
gregorian.month.12.name: December
gregorian.month.12.origin: Decem (ten) — the tenth month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.month.12.quality: Winter solstice, Saturnalia, the return of light
gregorian.month.2.brief: The month of cleansing — the last fires of purification before new growth
gregorian.month.2.name: February
gregorian.month.2.quality: Late winter, purification, preparation for spring
gregorian.month.3.brief: The month of Mars — the old Roman year began here, with war and planting alike
gregorian.month.3.name: March
gregorian.month.3.origin: Mars — god of war and agriculture, the Roman new year
gregorian.month.3.quality: Spring equinox, awakening, aggressive new growth
gregorian.month.4.brief: The month of opening — everything that was closed begins to unfold
gregorian.month.4.name: April
gregorian.month.4.origin: Aperire (to open) — the earth opens, buds unfold
gregorian.month.5.brief: The month of growth — the earth goddess whose name means 'she who is great'
gregorian.month.5.name: May
gregorian.month.5.origin: Maia — goddess of growth, mother of Mercury
gregorian.month.6.brief: The month of marriage — the queen of heaven blesses the longest days
gregorian.month.6.name: June
gregorian.month.6.origin: Juno — queen of the gods, patron of marriage
gregorian.month.7.brief: The month of Caesar — named for the man who remade time itself
gregorian.month.7.name: July
gregorian.month.7.origin: Julius Caesar — reformed the calendar, deified after death
gregorian.month.8.brief: The month of Augustus — the emperor who demanded a month as grand as July
gregorian.month.8.name: August
gregorian.month.8.origin: Augustus Caesar — first Roman emperor, 'the revered one'
gregorian.month.8.quality: Late summer, harvest begins, empire at zenith
gregorian.month.9.brief: The seventh month — still carrying its old number though it is now the ninth
gregorian.month.9.name: September
gregorian.month.9.origin: Septem (seven) — the seventh month of the old Roman calendar
gregorian.season.0.brief: The season of becoming — everything that slept now wakes
gregorian.season.0.name: Spring
gregorian.season.0.quality: Expansive — energy rises, seeds germinate, days lengthen
gregorian.season.1.brief: The season of being — the world at maximum brilliance
gregorian.season.1.name: Summer
gregorian.season.1.quality: Radiant — energy at peak, light dominates, life in full bloom
gregorian.season.2.brief: The season of letting go — beauty in decay, richness in release
gregorian.season.2.name: Autumn
gregorian.season.2.quality: Contracting — energy turns inward, fruit ripens, leaves fall
gregorian.season.2.theme: Harvest, release, gratitude for what grew
gregorian.season.3.brief: The season of rest — what appears dead is dreaming
gregorian.season.3.name: Winter
gregorian.season.3.quality: Still — energy withdrawn to roots, silence, gestation in darkness
gregorian.season.3.theme: Rest, depth, the hidden seed, essential stillness
hebrew.month.1.brief: Month of miracles and liberation — Passover
hebrew.month.1.name: Nisan
hebrew.month.10.name: Tevet
hebrew.month.11.brief: New Year of Trees — Tu B'Shevat
hebrew.month.11.name: Shevat
hebrew.month.12.brief: Month of Purim — hidden miracles revealed
hebrew.month.12.name: Adar
hebrew.month.13.brief: Leap month — Purim celebrated here in leap years
hebrew.month.13.name: Adar II
hebrew.month.2.brief: Month of natural healing — counting the Omer
hebrew.month.2.name: Iyar
hebrew.month.3.name: Sivan
hebrew.month.4.brief: Month of the broken tablets — seeing beyond
hebrew.month.4.name: Tammuz
hebrew.month.5.name: Av
hebrew.month.6.brief: Month of returning — preparation for the new year
hebrew.month.6.name: Elul
hebrew.month.7.brief: Month of the High Holidays — Rosh Hashanah, Yom Kippur, Sukkot
hebrew.month.7.name: Tishrei
hebrew.month.8.brief: The bitter month — no holidays, only rain prayers
hebrew.month.8.name: Cheshvan
hebrew.month.9.brief: Month of dreams and lights — Hanukkah
hebrew.month.9.name: Kislev
hebrew.tpl.detail: %1$s is the month of %2$s. Its letter is %3$s, its tribe is %4$s, its sense is %5$s. %6$s.
islamic.month.1.brief: Sacred month of mourning and remembrance
islamic.month.1.name: Muharram
islamic.month.10.brief: Month of celebration and voluntary fasting
islamic.month.10.event: Eid al-Fitr (1st) -- Festival of Breaking Fast
islamic.month.10.name: Shawwal
islamic.month.11.brief: Sacred month of truce and preparation for Hajj
islamic.month.11.name: Dhul Qa'dah
islamic.month.12.brief: Sacred month of pilgrimage and sacrifice
islamic.month.12.event: Hajj (8th-12th), Eid al-Adha (10th) -- Festival of Sacrifice
islamic.month.12.name: Dhul Hijjah
islamic.month.2.brief: Month of travel -- traditionally considered difficult
islamic.month.2.name: Safar
islamic.month.3.brief: Month of joy and prophetic celebration
islamic.month.3.name: Rabi al-Awwal
islamic.month.4.brief: Quiet month of reflection and growth
islamic.month.4.name: Rabi al-Thani
islamic.month.5.name: Jumada al-Ula
islamic.month.6.name: Jumada al-Thani
islamic.month.7.name: Rajab
islamic.month.8.name: Sha'ban
islamic.month.9.brief: Month of fasting, revelation, and spiritual renewal
islamic.month.9.name: Ramadan
islamic.prayer.0.meaning: Awakening -- beginning before the world stirs
islamic.prayer.0.name: Fajr
islamic.prayer.1.meaning: Remembrance -- pausing at the day's peak
islamic.prayer.1.name: Dhuhr
islamic.prayer.2.name: Asr
islamic.prayer.3.name: Maghrib
islamic.prayer.4.name: Isha
islamic.tpl.detail_sacred: This is one of the four sacred months.
